    V

    validateAdjCountry() - Method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidatorTest
    This method is used to test if a country has adjacent country or not.
    validateConnectCountry() - Method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidatorTest
    This method is used to test if a country is forming a connected sub graph.
    validateContinentForCountry() - Method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidatorTest
    This method is used to test if a continent has at least one country or not.
    validateContinentForSubGraph() - Method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidatorTest
    This method is used to test if a continent is a sub-graph or not.
    validateMapForContinent() - Method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidatorTest
    This method is used to test if a map has at least one continent or not.
    validateMapForNullMap() - Method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidatorTest
    This method is used to test if a map is null or not.
